summary: Full backend + frontend systematic coverage for Phase 1 Ecommerce Data Extractor. 14/14 pytest API tests PASS. All critical frontend flows (protected route, login error + success, job create/view/delete, invalid URL toast, JobDetail Phase 2 notice, logout) PASS via Playwright.

minor.issue: FastAPI on_event('startup'/'shutdown') is deprecated; migrate to lifespan context manager before FastAPI drops it.

action_items: (Optional / non-blocking) Replace deprecated @app.on_event with FastAPI lifespan handler.
(Optional) Consider lowering bcrypt rounds or switching to async hashing if login latency matters at scale; blocking bcrypt.checkpw is run on the event loop thread.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 94: bare `except Exception` around urlparse is dead code — urlparse does not raise for normal strings; safe but noisy.
Startup seed only runs when users collection is empty — correct for demo but will silently skip re-seeding if admin is ever deleted. Acceptable for Phase 1.
JWT_SECRET is appended to .env on first run; if the file doesn't end with a newline, the appended line is still OK because code prepends \n — verified.
User-scoped job queries use {id, user_id}; correctly returns 404 for other users' jobs, preventing IDOR.
Frontend api.js 401 interceptor force-reloads to /login — works but causes a full page reload instead of react-router navigation. Acceptable.
No /api/auth/logout endpoint — logout is purely client-side (localStorage clear). Acceptable for stateless JWT.
seed_data_creation: None — used seeded admin only. Test jobs created during tests are cleaned up via DELETE in teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 skeleton fully green. Backend URL validation rejects non-http(s), no-dot hosts, and malformed URLs (422). Jobs are user-scoped; random UUID GET returns 404. Swagger served at /api/docs. Frontend dark theme, protected routes, toasts, AlertDialog delete confirm, and logout button (data-testid=logout-button in AppHeader) all wired. Phase 2 will add Playwright scraper — tests for status transitions, products, logs, SSE and CSV download will be needed then.
